title: The Artisan Boom
description: In the wake of increased instability due to 'The Unseen Artist', a surge in local artisan markets emerges, with citizens seeking new sources of income and expression. This fresh influx of creativity draws attention from both domestic buyers and foreign investors, revitalizing sectors of the economy that were stagnant.
flavor: The towns are abuzz with the sounds of hammers, brushes, and laughter as citizens turn their hobbies into thriving businesses.
response_hint: Passing laws to support local artisans can further enhance economic stability and draw more investors.
